title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people fishing by a lake. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A man and his son are fishing beside a quiet lake. They are sitting on folding chairs and holding fishing rods. There is a small bag, a bucket, trees and water around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows students making a poster. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two students are making a poster at a classroom table. One student is writing with a coloured pen and the other is cutting out a picture. There are paper, scissors, glue and books on the table.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
